name: the extractor supports the numbered-list document shape
command:
printf '1. First rule here
2. Second rule here
3. Third rule here
' > n.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/extract-rules-from-url.sh" --source n.txt --source-id n --shape numbered-list 2>&1 | grep -q 'rules=3' && echo numbered-3 1>&2
